mapper.sql: gb.id, gb.guild_id, gb.game_partition_id, gb.user_id, gb.reason, gb.operator_id, gb.created_at, g.name as guild_name, u.nick_name as member_name, ou.nick_name as operator_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guild_blacklist gb LEFT JOIN guild g ON gb.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON gb.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ou ON gb.operator_id = ou.user_id WHERE gb.id IS NOT NULL AND gb.guild_id = #{guildId} AND gb.user_id = #{userId} AND u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberName}, '%') ORDER BY gb.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM guild_blacklist gb LEFT JOIN guild g ON gb.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON gb.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ou ON gb.operator_id = ou.user_id WHERE gb.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_blacklist SET guild_id = #{guildId}, game_partition_id = #{gamePartitionId}, user_id = #{userId}, reason = #{reason}, operator_id = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM guild_blacklist WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guild_blacklist WHERE guild_id = #{guildId} AND user_id = #{userId}
